description: Weekly grouped bumps gated by the determinism suite: if a dep changes one output byte, golden corpora fail CI and the PR does not merge. bun.lock regenerates in the same PR, keeping the lockfile perpetually fresh (the stale-lockfile publish class).

packageRules.description: One weekly PR for everything non-major; CI (tests + tarball smoke + e2e) is the merge gate.
Majors stay individual PRs for a human look.
